$schema_note: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the Presentations department pipeline. Build-time lockstep (scripts/sync_check.py) validates build_deck.py + the MASTER-QC-AUTOFAIL-RULESET.md Section-5 table + the role-library/sops dirs against THIS file, in BOTH directions. Editing this file is step (i) of SOP-SLIDE-06-EXTENSION-AND-SYNC; every other lockstep artifact is validated against it. SOP-LOCKED: any added/changed SOP, role, or gate MUST update this manifest (and bump manifest_version), add a build_deck.py preflight entry/checker, add the AF code to the MASTER ruleset, and add a test. sync_check.py FAILS the QC gate / commit / onboarding update if any of those four is skipped.

deliverables_required.label: assembled deck PPTX
deliverables_required.note: >1MB floor; a sub-1MB pptx implies empty/placeholder content

deliverables_required.label: presenter guide PDF
deliverables_required.note: >50KB; produced by Presenters Guide Specialist. REQUIRED UPSTREAM STEP.

deliverables_required.label: presenter speech markdown source (pure)
deliverables_required.note: >2KB; produced by Presenters Speech Writer (pure script). REQUIRED UPSTREAM STEP.

deliverables_required.label: presenter speech teleprompter PDF
deliverables_required.note: >20KB; produced by Presenters Speech Writer (teleprompter PDF render). REQUIRED UPSTREAM STEP.

deliverables_required.label: presenter speech (Fish-Audio expression-tagged)
deliverables_required.note: >2KB; the (break)/(laugh)/emphasis-tagged script that feeds the audio render. Produced by Presenters Speech Writer / Fish Audio Expression Specialist. REQUIRED UPSTREAM STEP.

deliverables_required.label: presenter audio MP3
deliverables_required.note: >500KB; produced by Audio Demonstration Specialist. REQUIRED UPSTREAM STEP.

deliverables_required.label: infographic checklist PNG
deliverables_required.note: >100KB; one-page infographic slide exported as PNG. Owned by slide-image-creator (SOP: slide-image-creator-sops.md infographic step) with final PNG export by pptx-assembly-specialist (SOP: pptx-assembly-specialist-sops.md infographic export step). REQUIRED UPSTREAM STEP.

deliverables_required.label: presenter teleprompter web app
deliverables_required.note: >10KB; the standalone scrolling teleprompter app (HTML + inline CSS/JS). Produced by build_teleprompter.py (teleprompter role). REQUIRED UPSTREAM STEP.

$bundle_note: TWO distinct file sets, explicitly separated so 'the bundle' is never ambiguous. build_bundle_files = the NINE operator-side build artifacts (the full DELIVERABLES_REQUIRED key set in build_deck.py) that must all exist + clear their min_bytes before closeout. client_package_files = the FIVE files the client actually receives in delivery/[DECK_SLUG]-FINAL/ (the AF-DH1 whitelist). The four build-only artifacts (speech_md, speech_fish_md, infographic_png, teleprompter_html) are inputs/working products, not loose client files. AF-DELIVER + AF-DH1 + AF-DELIVERY-COMPLETE all read client_package_files (FIVE); the per-artifact existence/size gate reads build_bundle_files (NINE).

phases.name: Deep Research

preflight.label: research brief (research_complete:true)

additional_preflights.label: research pack cited URLs (>= MIN_CITED_SOURCES distinct http(s) URLs; AF-RESEARCH-UNCITED)
claims-without-citation (slide copy claim markers must have a cited research pack; AF-RESEARCH-UNCITED)

required_brief_categories.name: Niche Deck Structures
required_brief_categories.note: Best-in-class deck structure patterns for the niche; always required

required_brief_categories.name: Pricing & Value Benchmarking
required_brief_categories.note: Comparable-market price band (low/median/high); checked by Offer Price Strategist and AF-CONVERTER-PARITY gate

required_brief_categories.name: Supporting Statistics / Studies / White Papers
required_brief_categories.note: Every stat must carry a source URL + publication date; stale >36 months flagged

required_brief_categories.name: External Corroboration (GP-8: who says so other than you?)
required_brief_categories.note: D1=named expert quotes, D2=third-party case studies, D3=Wall-of-Wins testimonials; zero HIGH/MEDIUM triggers GP-8 ALERT

required_brief_categories.name: Grounded Image Context
required_brief_categories.note: Scene descriptions anchoring Kie/GPT-Image-2 renders to THIS source's method; checked by Gate 5 and AF-CONVERTER-PARITY gate

required_brief_categories.name: Design + Hook + Pacing Best-Practices Research
required_brief_categories.note: Design-brief input for Typography Architect and Slide Image Creator; may be skipped only with design_research_mode: delegated_to_DIU + logged delegation note

required_brief_categories.name: Credible Attributable Quotes
required_brief_categories.note: Named, sourced, verbatim quotes for 'who says so' slides; routed to Slide Copywriter

required_brief_categories.name: Fact-Validation — Slide-Claim Verification Ledger
required_brief_categories.note: Every slide-bound figure verified; produces fact-validation ledger; routed to QC + Slide Copywriter

required_brief_categories.name: Objection Research
required_brief_categories.note: Audience objections with proof rebuttals; routed to Slide Copywriter + Devil's Advocate

required_brief_categories.name: Social-Proof Patterns
required_brief_categories.note: Social-proof formats and platforms; required-but-may-be-condensed; routed to Slide Copywriter

required_brief_categories.name: Persuasion-Framework Validation
required_brief_categories.note: Arc validation against proven structures; routed to Director + Slide Copywriter

required_brief_categories.name: Compliance Flags
required_brief_categories.note: Income claims, health claims, regulatory risks; routed to Director + Devil's Advocate

phases.name: Content-to-Presentation Conversion (Zoom/Video/Doc → Intake)

additional_preflights.label: converter extracts, never invents (every numeric/statistical figure in the source brief traces to the raw source; AF-CONVERTER-NO-INVENT). DEFERS unless both a source brief and the raw source text are present.

phases.routing_note: Content-first path only. Writes intake.json with source_brief_origin: 'content-to-presentation-architect'. Mandates Phase -0.5 Deep Research (SOP 9.8 step 3) before standard pipeline continues.

phases.name: Intake / Interview Confirm

preflight.label: intake.json (interview_confirmed:true, presentation_mode one-person|general, target_talk_minutes from the 20/30/60-min duration question + speaking time)

additional_preflights.label: slide-count floor (output slides >= target_talk_minutes x 1.3 slides/min; a 30-min/10-slide deck AUTO-FAILS; AF-SLIDE-COUNT-FLOOR). DEFERS to AF-SLIDE-COUNT-EXACT when the client stated an explicit requested count.

slide-count exact (when intake.json records client_requested_slide_count, the built deck must have EXACTLY that many slides — the client's number is honored verbatim 25->25/50->50/500->500, never floored up, capped down, defaulted, or substituted; the client is never asked to accept a different number; AUTHORITATIVE over the pacing floor and the Mode-B coverage floor; AF-SLIDE-COUNT-EXACT)
asset-intake question asked (intake records asset_intake_question_asked:true — the one question about photos/logo/colors/rough deck/slides/concepts; AF-ASSET-QUESTION-MISSING)
provided assets consumed (assets_manifest.json records each provided asset with a public_url + non-empty consumed_by; AF-MANIFEST-UNREFERENCED)
scratch deck parsed (uploaded old deck extracted to scratch_seed.json and seeded into the PRD; interview still runs in full; AF-SCRATCH-PARSE-SKIPPED)
pitch_included captured (intake.json carries an explicit boolean pitch_included; AF-PITCH-FLAG-UNSET)

phases.name: Priority-Shift Spec (the attention-content-strategist's spine, BEFORE copy)

preflight.label: priority-shift spine (priority_shift_spec.json true_goal + priority_stack[]; eight build-move beat tags monotonic in slides_copy.md; AF-NO-SHIFT). All P0B gates DEFER until this spec exists (no-regression switch).

additional_preflights.label: creation mode set (intake.creation_mode from_scratch|content_personal|content_general; content modes carry extracted_substance; AF-MODE-UNSET)
priority stack named before the first value/price ladder beat (Move 1; AF-NO-PRIORITY-STACK)
re-rank demanded after PRICE (Move 7, pitch decks only; AF-NO-RERANK)
time-bound trigger on the CTA (Move 8, pitch decks only; AF-NO-TRIGGER)

named persuasion beats present (problem/choice/fork/comparison/measurable-results/expert-proof/before-after; HOLE-C taxonomy now wired; AF-NO-PROBLEM/AF-NO-CHOICE/AF-NO-FORK/AF-NO-COMPARISON/AF-NO-MEASURABLE-RESULTS/AF-NO-EXPERT-PROOF/AF-NO-BEFORE-AFTER)

phases.name: Approved 3-Style Preview (9 samples → owner gateway sign-off, before full render)

preflight.label: approved style preview (after the 9 samples render via build_deck.py --sample, the owner picks 1 of 3 attention-grade variants via their OWN gateway; the winner's 3 representative renders are LOCKED + reused so kie never double-charges; AF-STYLE-UNPICKED / AF-STYLE-DOUBLECHARGE). DEFERS until the samples manifest exists.

phases.name: Priority-Shift Ship Gate (the framework's 14-item pre-output checklist)

preflight.label: priority-shift ship gate (the ONLY phase where copy+design+rendered images coexist; runs the 14-item pre-output checklist; item 0 = the North Star, attention is the #1 job; writes priority_shift_report.json; AF-PRIORITY-SHIFT). DEFERS pre-render.

phases.name: Copy QC (Phase 1Q) — sequenced AFTER Slide Copy (O1 re-sequence: a QC follows the artifact it grades; copy-QC at order 1.5 before copy order 4 was the defect this fixes)

preflight.label: copy QC report (gate Phase 1Q, average >= 8.5, no AF-* triggered, independent-reviewer provenance)

phases.name: Converting Arc Allocation

preflight.label: converting arc — per-slide arc-section allocation

additional_preflights.label: peak-end rule — the arc declares a deliberate PEAK/APEX beat AND a deliberate ending beat (a flat ending is remembered as flat; AF-PEAK-END). DEFERS without doctrine/arc.

offer ladder + re-pitch (CONDITIONAL on pitch_included:true — arc carries value-stack/anchor/price ladder beats AND a re-pitch after FINAL; AF-PITCH-MISSING). Pitchless decks (pitch_included:false) defer this and are governed by AF-PITCH-LEAK instead.
pitchless integrity (pitch_included:false decks carry NO offer/price/ladder/re-pitch content and no price_ladder.json; AF-PITCH-LEAK)

phases.name: Research-to-Slide Mapping

preflight.label: research woven across the deck — research_map.json maps facts/quotes/stats to >=60% of non-exempt content slides; >=8 distinct items (AF-RESEARCH-WEAVE; defers until copy exists)

phases.name: Slide Copy

preflight.label: slide copy authored per doctrine (hook >=7x, 10 components)

phases.name: Typography / Design Brief

preflight.label: typography/design brief — per-slide creative art direction

phases.name: Typography QC — sequenced AFTER Design (O1; independent reviewer)

preflight.label: typography QC report (gate Phase Typography-QC, average >= 8.5, independent-reviewer provenance)

phases.name: Prompt Authoring — each slide prompt to the 9,000-char standard

preflight.label: rich per-slide prompt — every slide has a >=9,000-char prompt in working/prompts/ (rendered VERBATIM)

phases.name: Prompt QC — sequenced AFTER Prompt-Authoring (O1; independent reviewer)

preflight.label: prompt QC report (gate Phase Prompt-QC, average >= 8.5, independent-reviewer provenance)

phases.name: Deterministic Render (build_deck.py — this script)
Image QC — sequenced AFTER Render (O1; independent multimodal reviewer)

preflight.label: image QC report (gate Phase Image-QC, average >= 8.5, independent-reviewer provenance)

additional_preflights.label: most vivid by the end — the OFFER/PROMISE-APEX slide is the single most vivid rendered slide (von Restorff deterministic backstop reusing AF-VISUAL-VARIETY pixel data; AF-NO-SALIENCE-APEX). DEFERS pre-render / without doctrine.

phases.name: PPTX Assembly
Presenter Speech (length gate)

preflight.label: speech length — presenter speech words >= target_talk_minutes x 120 wpm (fails short; defers when speech absent)

phases.name: Speech QC — sequenced AFTER Speech (O1; independent reviewer; conditional)

preflight.label: speech QC report (gate Phase Speech-QC, average >= 8.5, independent-reviewer provenance; defers when speech QC absent)

phases.name: Notes-Pane Sync — reorder notes assembly to AFTER the speech is finalized
Delivery Interlock + Postflight Completeness Gate
Signature-Presentation Router / Claim Gate (deck_type must be declared)

preflight.label: signature-presentation routing/claim gate (AF-SP-TYPE-UNDECLARED): if the run carries signature-presentation signals (an sp_intake.json, a set Signature frame, a frame-selection question, or a 'signature presentation' request) but intake.json does NOT declare deck_type == signature_presentation, fail-closed. Runs for EVERY deck (does NOT defer, unlike the three P-SP gates that follow) via 51-signature-presentation/scripts/prove_sp_routing.evaluate_run_dir — closes the highest-severity skip where a signature presentation is built through the generic path by omitting the magic word (which would make every SP gate no-op). A non-signature deck with no SP signal passes untouched.

phases.name: Signature-Presentation Intake Gate (8 Questions in ONE block + frame)

preflight.label: signature-presentation intake gate (AF-SP-8Q-MISSING / AF-SP-8Q-SPLIT / AF-SP-FRAME-UNSET / AF-SP-TYPE-MISMATCH / AF-SP-OFFER-UNDECLARED): the 8 Questions delivered in ONE block + a set frame (rulebook|vault|quest|original) + the q7 offer(s) declared into the offer-token ledger. DEFERS (returns empty) unless intake.json deck_type == signature_presentation, so non-signature decks behave EXACTLY as before (mirror of the _chk_style_preview defer switch).

phases.name: Signature-Presentation SACRED Structure (4-phase arc + phase labels)

preflight.label: signature-presentation structure gate (AF-SP-SLIDE-FLOOR / AF-SP-PHASE-RANGE / AF-SP-PHASE-ORDER / AF-SP-PHASE-LABEL / AF-SP-IMG-SUGGESTION / AF-SP-CASESTUDY-CAP / AF-SP-TEACH-STEPS / AF-SP-HOOK / AF-SP-QUADRANT): 100-slide floor unless a logged client-exact override, the 4 phase floors (avatar 11 / story 13 / teaching 36 / pitch 40) contiguous and in order with each phase's label slide, a non-empty suggested_image on every slide, at most 2 case studies, 3 to 7 teaching steps, one central hook + four distinct section hooks, and the N.E.E.I.T. + 4-Quadrant markers. DEFERS (returns empty) unless intake.json deck_type == signature_presentation.

phases.name: Signature-Presentation Phase-3 (Teaching) No-Pitch Hygiene

preflight.label: signature-presentation Phase-3 no-pitch hygiene (AF-SP-P3-PITCH): no q7 offer/product name, no price/monetary token, and no enroll/buy/scarcity CTA on any teaching-band slide, and a contiguous Phase-3 to Phase-4 bridge (the final teaching step may promise what comes next but may NOT name a price or product). DEFERS (returns empty) unless intake.json deck_type == signature_presentation.

autofails.trigger: rich prompt missing, under the reconciled 9,000-char floor (PROMPT_CHAR_FLOOR), or missing a required structural block ([ARCHETYPE ...] / NEGATIVE BLOCK / 'Do not ')
composed prompt over the 18000 ceiling
hardcoded demographic default in the slide spec (60/30/10 landmine)
research_complete not true

research pack contains fewer than MIN_CITED_SOURCES (8) distinct http(s) URLs, OR slide copy contains factual/statistical claim markers with zero cited URLs in the research pack — the self-asserted research_complete:true flag is ignored; real citations are required
output deck has fewer slides than the client source deck (Mode B add-only)
postflight completeness gate — one or more required deliverables missing or below size threshold
presenter speech word count below target_talk_minutes x 120 wpm floor

the final .pptx ships with empty notes panes on content slides (per-slide speaker notes not injected) — fixed by reordering notes assembly to P9.5-NOTES-SYNC (AFTER the speech is finalized and QC-passed), then re-verified here at postflight
delivery interlock — the five-file client package (client_package_files) is not assembled / a required artifact is missing or empty
delivery human-handoff gate not satisfied
five-file bundle / infographic / GHL upload incomplete
hook on > 4 slides
hook in a footer/band position
zero dedicated hook slides
hook printed 2+ times on one slide
hook mutated/extended/reworded
hook misspelled/garbled on render
signature quote conflated with main hook
speaker SAY line on the face
internal pitch doctrine as caption
image-narration caption
meta-telegraph / 'webinar' / technique label
credential/justification dump
bracket/placeholder token on a rendered slide (AF-AUD-6)
placeholder on render — cross-listed audience-facing alias of AF-PLACEHOLDER
> 3 text blocks
headline > 9 words
2+ core ideas
full value trio on one slide
bulleted pain list
comparison table > 2 rows
price beats < 8 slides apart
anchor outside 25-45% depth
DROP with no BUILDUP before it
no value-stack slide before Drop 1
no promises beat before anchor
Wall of Wins not 4-6 before offer
no 4-7 slide re-pitch after FINAL
section below its slide floor
deck not produced by canonical scripts/build_deck.py (or preflight skipped)
generation used a non-manifest model
no multimodal image-QC pass over rendered slides

assembled PPTX page count != QC-passed render count; or converter-origin deck (source_brief_origin: 'content-to-presentation-architect') failed runtime parity gate (canonical renderer + model pin + vision QC + Phase -0.5 research brief with Category E+F + persuasion variables)
slide text drawn by Pillow/PPTX/ImageDraw rather than baked by the image model, or flat placeholder fill
rendered slide was not KIE-baked (native render, missing image, or flat-placeholder fill below the placeholder floor)
image prompt under the reconciled 9,000-char standard (PROMPT_CHAR_FLOOR) or over the 18,000-char ceiling (PROMPT_CHAR_CEILING) or missing required structural blocks

Phase-1Q copy QC report was self-graded / builder-graded — it lacks an independent-reviewer provenance block (qc_independence: graded_by + independent:true naming a QC specialist who is NOT build_deck.py / self / builder / author / the deck-copy author), is marked self_graded:true, sets independent:false, or names a reviewer equal to the recorded builder

the Typography-QC report (working/qc/typography_qc_report.json), sequenced AFTER Design, is missing, not gated 'Phase Typography-QC', below the 8.5 average, has a triggered autofail, does not mark pass:true, OR was self/builder-graded (lacks independent-reviewer provenance per the generalized AF-QC-INDEPENDENCE contract)

the Prompt-QC report (working/qc/prompt_qc_report.json), sequenced AFTER Prompt-Authoring, is missing, not gated 'Phase Prompt-QC', below the 8.5 average, has a triggered autofail, does not mark pass:true, OR was self/builder-graded (no independent-reviewer provenance)

the Image-QC report (working/qc/image_qc_report.json), sequenced AFTER Render, is missing, not gated 'Phase Image-QC', below the 8.5 average, has a triggered autofail, does not mark pass:true, OR was self/builder-graded (no independent-reviewer provenance)

the Speech-QC report (working/qc/speech_qc_report.json), sequenced AFTER Speech, is present but not gated 'Phase Speech-QC', below the 8.5 average, has a triggered autofail, does not mark pass:true, OR was self/builder-graded (no independent-reviewer provenance). CONDITIONAL: defers (passes) when the report is absent at pre-speech render, enforced once it exists.

output slide count is below target_talk_minutes x 1.3 (the low end of the verified 1.3-1.5 slides/min pacing band); e.g. a 30-minute talk on 10 slides (floor 39) AUTO-FAILS — it is a reading session, not a paced deck. DEFERS to AF-SLIDE-COUNT-EXACT when the client stated an explicit requested count (the pacing floor must never force MORE slides than the client asked for).

the client stated an EXPLICIT requested slide count (intake.json.client_requested_slide_count) but the built deck does not have EXACTLY that many slides (too few OR too many). The client's requested slide count is honored EXACTLY (25->25, 50->50, 500->500); it is NEVER floored up, capped down, defaulted, or substituted by the duration/content/source heuristic, and the client is NEVER asked to accept a different number. AUTHORITATIVE over the duration pacing floor (AF-SLIDE-COUNT-FLOOR) and the Mode-B anti-compression coverage floor (AF-COVERAGE-1) — both DEFER when an explicit requested count is present. DEFERS (passes) only when no explicit count was stated, or the output count is unreadable (the rich-prompt/coverage gates own a missing slides.json).

CONDITIONAL on intake.json.pitch_included:true. When the client said the deck ends with an offer/pitch, the converting arc (arc_allocation.json) carries no offer-ladder beats (value-stack -> anchor -> price drops) OR no re-pitch beat after the FINAL price — a teaching dump that never asks for the sale, or asks once and never recovers a 'no'. DEFERS for pitchless decks (pitch_included:false), which are first-class and governed by AF-PITCH-LEAK; defers when the flag is unset (AF-PITCH-FLAG-UNSET owns that).

template-sameness or cliche — a single layout archetype covers more than ARCHETYPE_DOMINANCE_CEILING (60%) of the slides (forty copies of one layout), OR slide copy leans on a banned worn-out cliche phrase

all-dark monotone deck — >= 90% of rendered slides share one dominant background hue bucket OR >= 90% of slides are below the dark-luma threshold (0.30) with < 10% light/break slides. Rejects decks with no visual variety (e.g. all-navy 35-slide deck) that are illegible at projection distance and violate WCAG AA contrast.

dev artifacts in the delivered bundle — any *.py, *.sh, ~$* Office lock/temp file, tasks/ directory, task_*.json, or numbered intermediate .md working draft present in the final bundle directory. The client package must contain ONLY the canonical deliverable files.

image-QC report is absent, stale (older than the rendered PNGs), or rubber-stamped (lacks a per-slide PASS/FAIL row for all N rendered slides). A report that was auto-populated from a template without real per-slide entries is refused. Requires: report exists AND mtime > all PNG mtimes AND slides[] array has one entry per rendered slide.

off-brand palette — any rendered slide whose dominant palette colors ALL fall outside the declared brand token set (intake.json brand.palette) by more than BRAND_CONSISTENCY_TOLERANCE (80 RGB units). Complements AF-VISUAL-VARIETY: variety rejects sameness; brand rejects off-token outliers (e.g. fantasy-castle render against navy/gold token set). Defers when no brand palette is declared.

dark/black background keywords (e.g. 'dark background', 'black background', 'dark theme', 'near-black', 'dark slide', 'dark mode') or near-black hex/rgb colors detected in working/prompts/*.txt or working/research/design-brief-*.md without client_dark_theme:true in intake.json. Slides MUST use LIGHT/bright backgrounds by default; dark is opt-in by explicit client request only.

a price-drop rung's slide window does not run the four-beat cadence loop VALUE_ADD -> PROMISE -> REPITCH_MINI -> COST_OF_INACTION in monotonic slide order. Layers the per-rung ORDERING requirement on top of AF-C7's global price-drop<->value floor; the two do not contradict.

the deck never states the cost of NOT acting: price_ladder.json.cost_of_inaction_slide is null/absent, or no COST_OF_INACTION arc beat is tagged in slides_copy.md. Promotes offer SOP 9.6 from 'flag as a doctrine gap' to a hard gate.

the guarantee is a bare refund-template phrase (money-back / 30-day / refund / satisfaction guaranteed / no-questions-asked) with no client-specific felt frame: price_ladder.json.guarantee.statement reduces to a generic template AND no guarantee_felt_frame is supplied. The mechanical anti-generic half is the hard trigger; the felt-vs-generic VERDICT is logged to copy_qc_report.json.

generic intake content but ZERO named-method beat: no NAMED_METHOD arc beat in slides_copy.md AND no intake.json.named_methodology. Generic content ships at generic prices; the department must PROPOSE a branded-method name for owner approval rather than leave the deck method-less. De-inverts the retired hard 'never fabricate a methodology name' ban.

a NAMED_METHOD beat appears on a slide with NEITHER a client-supplied intake.json.named_methodology NOR an owner_approved:true record in working/copy/method_name_approval.json. Catches silent invention; owner-approved or client-supplied naming is required, silent fabrication stays banned.

no EXPECTATION beat stating how long the result takes: no EXPECTATION arc beat in slides_copy.md, or the beat carries no duration token (day/week/month/session/hour/minute), or intake.json.time_to_result is absent (the timeframe must be sourced from intake, never fabricated).

the canonical hook is sung fewer than 5 or more than 20 times in PRESENTERS-SPEECH.md (char-exact to intake.json.hook). Below 5 = under-sung; above 20 = wallpaper. The slide-side visual ceiling (AF-HOOK-1 / AF-C2, 3-4 dedicated slides) is UNCHANGED: visual ceiling vs spoken floor, reconciled in SOP-SLIDE-03. CONDITIONAL: defers when the speech is absent at pre-speech phase.

Decision 1C. intake.json does not record asset_intake_question_asked:true. Every signature run MUST ask the client the one asset-intake question (anything they already have — photos, a logo, brand colors, a rough/old deck, slides, or concepts) and record that it was asked. Defers (passes) only when intake.json is absent (AF-SLIDE-COUNT-FLOOR / _chk_intake own intake absence).

Decision 1C. The client provided assets but assets_manifest.json is absent/invalid, OR a provided asset is not provably consumed downstream — it lacks a resolvable public_url and/or a non-empty consumed_by list (so it is never fed to the Brand Steward + Slide Image Creator as gpt-image-2 input_urls). Collected-but-ignored assets fail. Defers when no assets were provided.

Decision 1C. assets_manifest.json records a client scratch/old deck was provided (scratch_deck.provided:true) but it was not parsed (scratch_deck.parsed not true), OR working/copy/scratch_seed.json is absent/invalid, OR the PRD (mission_prd.json) shows no seeded scratch content. The interview still runs in full; the seed only seeds the PRD. Defers when no scratch deck was uploaded.

Decision 2A. intake.json.pitch_included is missing or not a boolean at intake. The deck must capture an EXPLICIT yes/no (yes = the presentation ends with an offer/pitch; no = a teaching/content-only presentation). It is non-defaultable — a deck must never silently inherit 'has a pitch'. Defers when intake.json is absent (_chk_intake owns that).

Decision 2A. A PITCHLESS deck (intake.json.pitch_included:false) carries pitch/price/offer content: a price_ladder.json exists (the Offer Price Strategist ran), or arc_allocation.json / slides_copy.md contain suppressed sale-mechanic tokens (price ladder, value stack, anchor price, re-pitch, cost of inaction, buy now, payment plan, etc.). Pitchless is first-class: the pitch machinery is SUPPRESSED and no pitch content may appear. Defers when pitch_included is true (AF-PITCH-MISSING governs) or unset (AF-PITCH-FLAG-UNSET governs).

Decision 3C. Phase-0 Kie.ai balance pre-flight. The live credit balance (GET https://api.kie.ai/api/v1/chat/credit) is below the estimated floor for this deck (slide_count x PER_SLIDE_CREDIT_ESTIMATE x KIE_BALANCE_FLOOR_MULTIPLIER), OR the balance could not be verified. HARD-ABORTS before any slide is dispatched so a run never dies mid-deck. An unverifiable balance is never treated as 'enough'.

Decision 3C. The deterministic signature runner (scripts/run_signature_deck.py) dispatched a phase without every lower-order phase having an attestation in working/checkpoints/process_manifest.json AND its produces_artifact present — and no logged OWNER-AUTHORIZED skip record (working/checkpoints/phase_skip_approvals.json owner_approved:true) covers the missing phase. Phase N+1 reads phase N's attestation as a precondition, so skipping/reordering a phase is structurally impossible except via an explicit, logged owner authorization (not a free flag).

Decision 5C. The native PPTX text/element-overlay path is ELIMINATED. Fires when an eliminated pptx_text_overlays.json file is present in the run dir (its mere presence at assembly is a violation), OR any delivered slide carries a native (non-notes) on-slide text run instead of a single composed gpt-image-2 image. Persistent garble escalates to a re-prompt/re-seed loop then human escalation — never a native overlay. Strengthens (does not replace) AF-BAKED / AF-I14. The only legitimate PPTX text part is the off-slide speaker-notes pane.

SHARED CONTRACT (FIX 2 + FIX 9). The deck — or any slide PNG — was produced by a path other than the ONE canonical render surface scripts/build_deck.py + scripts/run_signature_deck.py kie.ai gpt-image-2 path. Fires when working/checkpoints/process_manifest.json carries no phase=='render' attestation written by build_deck.py (write_process_manifest), when a hand-rolled / per-deck renderer or assembler under working/*.py (a direct kie createTask, a slide-canvas builder, or a native add_textbox assembler) produced or could produce the pixels, or when any delivered slide cannot be tied to a real canonical kie taskId / recordInfo trace. The build_deck-enforced, NON-NULL successor of the toothless closeout-only AF-RENDERER (which it strengthens, never replaces). MAY be skipped ONLY by an explicit, logged owner/founder approval token recorded in process_manifest.json (owner_skip_approval) — never silently, never by an agent's own choice.

SHARED CONTRACT (FIX 2 + FIX 9). A slide image was fabricated LOCALLY instead of baked by kie.ai gpt-image-2 — the local-Pillow/PIL slide-canvas signature. Fires when a working/*.py script constructs a 2048x1152 (or any full-bleed) slide canvas via PIL Image.new / ImageDraw to draw a cream or color typography card, when a slide PNG falls below the 51,200-byte kie-bake floor (PLACEHOLDER_MIN_BYTES — the flat-cream-card signature), or when a pure-typography hook slide carries no real kie taskId. The ONLY Pillow/PIL step permitted anywhere is the locked-logo image composite (SOP-IMG-05); never a slide canvas, surface, or text. 'skip kie.ai for this slide' is doctrine-illegal and appears in no role, SOP, or script. Strengthens (does not replace) AF-BAKED / AF-I14. MAY be skipped ONLY by an explicit, logged owner/founder approval token recorded in process_manifest.json (owner_skip_approval) — never silently, never by an agent's own choice.

SHARED CONTRACT (FIX 2 + FIX 9). The image-QC pass is PIXEL-BLIND — it graded a self-typed number, reasoned from filenames / prompt text, or omitted a real multimodal vision read of one or more rendered slide PNGs. Fires when working/qc/vision_qc_log.json is absent / empty or lacks a non-null vision_api_response provenance record for EVERY rendered slide, when the image-QC report excludes any slide index from scope (e.g. 'slides 1/24/49 out of scope'), or when the report blesses a native typography-overlay model (a typography_overlay_readiness criterion or an 'overlay the headlines' recommendation). Every slide — cover, section dividers, and pure-typography / hook slides included — is in scope under the same battery. The build_deck-enforced, deterministic vision-provenance successor of the closeout-only AF-NO-VISION-QC; complements _chk_image_qc (report gate) and check_image_qc_present (freshness gate). MAY be skipped ONLY by an explicit, logged owner/founder approval token recorded in process_manifest.json (owner_skip_approval) — never silently, never by an agent's own choice.

OUT-OF-BAND DELIVERY BOUNDARY GATE (gate_delivered_artifact). A deck artifact (.pptx/.pdf) was presented for delivery with NO governed run dir (no working/checkpoints/process_manifest.json resolvable from the artifact or an explicit run dir) — i.e. it was hand-built OUTSIDE run_signature_deck.py and never passed through the governed pipeline. This FLIPS the legacy delivery_gate no-run-dir DEFER to a fail-closed REJECT at the delivery boundary, so a deck produced by python-pptx/Pillow/Google-Slides with no governed run dir cannot ship. Skippable ONLY by an explicit, logged owner_skip_approval token (gate=AF-NO-RUN-DIR) in process_manifest.json or an owner_skip_approval.json adjacent to the artifact — never silently, never by an agent's own choice.

OUT-OF-BAND DELIVERY BOUNDARY GATE (gate_delivered_artifact). The SHIPPED artifact cannot be proven to be a kie.ai-baked image-only deck: the process manifest's render record maps no slide (or one or more slides) to a REAL kie.ai taskId (taskId in {None, '', native, placeholder, none, null, n/a}), OR the delivered .pptx/.pdf is unreadable / not a real OOXML/PDF deck (a renamed-image or hand-built decoy). A canonical deck records a kie taskId per slide; absent that, the images were not kie-rendered. Inspects the artifact itself with stdlib only (no python-pptx dependency) so it bites on any box. Skippable ONLY by an explicit, logged owner_skip_approval token (gate=AF-NOT-KIE-RENDERED) — never silently.

the DECLARED type system (working/typography/type_layout_system.md) sets a body/subhead size below the 18pt-equivalent floor (22pt when client_dark_theme opt-in), declares a non-modular type scale (not 4-5 steps), or a text contrast below WCAG AA (4.5:1 normal; 7:1 when dark opt-in) — OR the type_layout_system.md tokens are missing once a design system exists (the R8 phantom-artifact hole). DETERMINISTIC numeric rejector that COMPLEMENTS the vision-opinion AF-TYPOGRAPHY-QC; it rejects a sub-floor declared design BEFORE any render.

research is funnelled to one proof slide instead of woven across the deck. CONDITIONAL (defers until copy exists): once slides_copy.md exists, working/research/research_map.json must assign a real research item (verbatim anchor) to >= RESEARCH_WEAVE_FLOOR_PCT (60%) of NON-EXEMPT content slides, the copy must actually use the anchor on >= that floor of mapped slides, AND the deck must draw on >= MIN_DISTINCT_RESEARCH_ITEMS (8) distinct items so breadth cannot be faked by repeating one stat. Hook/pure-type/transition slides are exempt and excluded from the denominator. Replaces the toothless 'a pack exists' breadth logic of _chk_claims_without_citation (kept as the zero-research backstop).
a people-bearing image prompt carries no facial expression/emotion token (the intelligence-engine FACIAL check). Mechanical half; the vision verdict half (AF-FACE-MOOD) is owned by Image-QC.
a scene-bearing image prompt states no setting/world or no believability/scale grounding (the intelligence-engine WORLD check).
a people/scene image prompt states no key/fill/rim lighting direction (the intelligence-engine LIGHTING check).
a people-bearing prompt draws no hairstyle token from the authentic-representation catalog (the intelligence-engine REPRESENTATION check, mechanical half).

the deck has no FELT_STAKES beat (a concrete, felt cost-of-staying-stuck), or it is mis-ordered (the intelligence-engine EMOTIONAL check, deck level). Also implemented in pitch_engines_check.chk_felt_stakes; intelligence_engines_check is the doctrinal owner.

the deck has no VILLAIN/antagonist beat, or the villain is introduced after the hero (the intelligence-engine STORY check, villain-before-hero ordering). Also implemented in pitch_engines_check.chk_villain; intelligence_engines_check is the doctrinal owner.

a slide prompt is missing one or more of the 8 required negative-block defect class tokens (watermark, emoji, Calibri, illustration/clip-art/cartoon, generic stock, blurry/soft-focus, text floating/unanchored, people clipping/overlap). All 8 classes must appear in every prompt's negative block.

a slide prompt carries no spelling-lock directive token (e.g. 'spell every word correctly', 'zero spelling errors', 'no misspelled words', 'all text legible and spelled correctly'). The spelling-lock is mandatory in every prompt.

a slide prompt fails the density gate: missing a hex color code, missing a type-size spec (e.g. '36pt', '48px'), missing a composition/zone token (e.g. 'left third', 'upper right', 'center zone'), or carrying fewer than PROMPT_MIN_DISTINCT_WORDS (220) distinct words — the word-count rubber-stamp is replaced by a true distinct-word density check.

a slide's rich prompt does not contain verbatim copies of the non-trivial copy strings (headline, subhead, CTA) from slides.json — the prompt is the canonical render surface and must bake copy into the model instruction, not rely on post-render overlay.

a copy-QC report contains a foreign/corrupt rubric signature: scoring prompt length as a quality proxy (score_prompt_length), rewarding overlay-readiness, using out-of-scope escape clauses, or applying a pass threshold below 8.5. Ungoverned hand-rolled QC generators that emit reports with these corrupt patterns are neutralized.

a people-bearing prompt is missing facial expression/emotion tokens AND/OR lighting direction tokens (key/fill/rim) — the build_deck.py intelligence-engine mechanical check wired to check_intelligence_engines_prompt(). Complements the qc_check-owned AF-FACE-PROMPT-MISSING / AF-LIGHT-PROMPT-MISSING with a hard build-gate enforcement.

hook cadence out of the sanctioned banded range: the refrain appears on >4 slides (over-stamp / wallpaper) OR on 2+ consecutive slides OR in every footer-band OR on fewer than the 3 named anchor beats — i.e. BOTH the ceiling and the floor are enforced. A deck that wallpapers the hook everywhere AND a deck that barely plants it fail AF-C2.

generic copy-engine deficiency emitted when an intelligence-engine problem dict carries no specific code — a catch-all that names the failing dimension; the exact failure is in the detail field of the routeback work order

a slide prompt clears the 9,000-char LENGTH floor but scores below the EXCELLENCE floor (0.55) on the QUALITY dimension: negative-block coverage, spelling-lock richness, anatomy/world-grounding, brand HEX + type SIZE + composition, and lexical richness — two independent floors (length AND excellence); boilerplate-padded prompts route back

the engines pass per-slide but the deck fails cohesion: recurring-character continuity broken, palette/brand not orchestrated, world continuity absent, or archetype rhythm absent (40 unrelated one-offs); fires BEFORE assembly so only the inconsistent slides are re-rendered, not the whole deck

the sacred refrain is baked into a FOOTER or bottom recurring band on a slide's image prompt — the hook is never a footer stamp; footer placement on ANY slide fails this slide regardless of deck-level hook count

generic intelligence-engine failure when a perceptual-engine problem dict carries no specific AF code — emitted by check_prompt_qc_deterministic as a catch-all for unclassified engine token absence; the exact failing engine dimension is in the routeback work order

the WRITING-half intelligence engines (Story villain-before-hero, Emotional felt-stakes-before-offer, Hook copy refrain, Recap, narrative harmony) auto-failed at COPY-QC — the deck must fix the SCRIPT before any image prompt is authored (shift-left); no prompts are authored until this gate passes

generic One-Big-Idea violation catch-all — the OBI dimension name for any unclassified multi-idea defect; the specific violation is carried by the AF-OBI-1..6 sub-codes; this base code labels the dimension in routeback work orders

a slide's rich prompt is missing one or more of the REQUIRED_STRUCTURAL_BLOCKS — the mandatory sections (ARCHETYPE, NEGATIVE BLOCK, 'Do not ' imperatives) that the build preflight asserts are present; a prompt that lacks a block cannot render correctly and routes back

the persuasion (offer) sub-engine checker (pitch_engines_check.py) could not be imported, exposes no check_copy entry point, raised an exception, or the offer sub-engines auto-failed at COPY-QC (PROMISE must precede PRICE; value cadence, cost-of-inaction, branded method, guarantee specificity, and time-to-result must all pass before any prompt is authored — shift-left)

intake.json.creation_mode is unset or not one of from_scratch|content_personal|content_general (a content mode also needs extracted_substance). Step Zero of every deck is to identify the creation mode (P118). DEFERS for a legacy/pre-doctrine deck (no mode AND no priority_shift_spec.json) so an in-flight build is never broken.

the deck engineers no deliberate priority shift: priority_shift_spec.json lacks a true_goal or a named priority_stack[], OR fewer than 5 of the 8 build-move beat tags are present in slides_copy.md, OR they are out of canonical (monotonic) order. The North Star is to re-rank the owner's offer/idea to the top of the audience's priority stack. DEFERS until the P0B priority_shift_spec.json exists (HOLE-C orphan now wired).
Move 1 is missing — the audience's current priority stack is not NAMED before the first value/price ladder beat in slides_copy.md (P142). DEFERS without doctrine/copy/ladder.
Move 7 is missing — after the PRICE beat the deck does not demand the re-rank / decision out loud (P148). DEFERS for pitchless/unset decks (the re-rank is a sale mechanic).
Move 8 is missing — the CTA carries no time-bound trigger (deadline / scarcity window / act-now) (P149). DEFERS for pitchless/unset decks.

a PROCLAMATION hedges its claim with a strong multi-word hedge phrase (kind of / sort of / you might want to consider / i guess / more or less ...). A proclamation is a plain, bold claim of truth that dares to challenge the norm (P109, SOP-PROCLAMATION-01). DEFERS without doctrine/copy.
the arc fails the peak-end rule — arc_allocation.json declares no PEAK/APEX/WOW beat, or no deliberate ending/recap/CTA beat. A flat ending is remembered as flat (P49). DEFERS without doctrine/arc.

the OFFER/PROMISE-APEX slide (the arc's PEAK/APEX beat) is not the single most VIVID rendered slide in the deck (von Restorff — the most vivid thing is what the mind prioritizes). Deterministic backstop to the human style sign-off: vividness proxy = 1 - dominant-colour fraction, reusing the AF-VISUAL-VARIETY pixel data; fires only on a clear inversion (apex < 0.85 x deck peak). DEFERS pre-render / without doctrine / when the apex slide cannot be identified (P48/P155).

a content-converter deck INVENTS rather than EXTRACTS — a numeric/statistical figure in the converter's source brief does not trace back to the raw source text (P167d). DEFERS unless BOTH the source brief AND the raw source text are present on disk.

HOLE-C taxonomy (now wired). A converting deck names no PROBLEM/villain beat in slides_copy.md (SOP-ENGINE-00 / SOP-PITCH-06 persuasion-beat taxonomy). Generous synonym matching; DEFERS without doctrine/pitch/copy.
HOLE-C taxonomy (now wired). A converting deck presents no explicit CHOICE/decision beat. DEFERS without doctrine/pitch/copy.
HOLE-C taxonomy (now wired). A converting deck draws no FORK (two-paths) beat. DEFERS without doctrine/pitch/copy.
HOLE-C taxonomy (now wired). A converting deck draws no COMPARISON (old-way vs new-way) beat. DEFERS without doctrine/pitch/copy.
HOLE-C taxonomy (now wired). A converting deck cites no MEASURABLE RESULT (a number / %% / ROI). DEFERS without doctrine/pitch/copy.
HOLE-C taxonomy (now wired). A converting deck carries no EXPERT/third-party PROOF beat (study / case study / testimonial). DEFERS without doctrine/pitch/copy.
HOLE-C taxonomy (now wired). A converting deck shows no BEFORE/AFTER transformation beat. DEFERS without doctrine/pitch/copy.

the 9 style samples (3 variants x 3 representative slides) were rendered but the OWNER has not picked a winning variant (working/copy/style_preview_choice.json must carry owner_approved:true + chosen_variant). The full deck must NOT render until the owner picks A/B/C via their OWN gateway — never the operator chat. Waivable only by a logged owner_skip_approval. DEFERS until the style samples manifest exists.

the winning style variant's 3 representative slide renders are not LOCKED + reused (style_preview_choice.locked_renders missing or its files absent) — kie would be charged twice for the already-approved samples. The approved samples must be carried forward, never re-dispatched. Waivable only by a logged owner_skip_approval.

the framework's 14-item pre-output ship gate failed at P-SHIFT-QC (order 7.5 — the ONLY phase where copy + design + rendered images coexist). Item 0 is the North Star: the #1 job is to hold attention. The composite reuses the shift-left gates (mode / priority-stack / shift / rerank / trigger / hedge / peak-end / salience-apex) plus the spec's one-promise/one-wow/one-demonstration anchors, writes working/qc/priority_shift_report.json (one row per item + evidence), and refuses ship until all 14 PASS. Waivable only by a logged owner_skip_approval. DEFERS pre-render / without doctrine (P161/P155).

HOLE-A (register the live-but-unregistered code). The writing arc is out of canonical order — an out-of-order present pair across HOOK -> VILLAIN -> FELT_STAKES -> PROMISE -> PRICE -> RECAP. Emitted by intelligence_engines_check.check_narrative_harmony (called inside check_copy) and consumed by run_signature_deck.py, but absent from the registry until now. Registered via all four SOP-SLIDE-06 lockstep steps.

HOLE-B (emitted-but-unregistered, now registered). The deck plants no recurring Hook refrain across the copy (the Hook intelligence engine, copy half). Emitted by intelligence_engines_check.check_copy.
HOLE-B (emitted-but-unregistered, now registered). The deck carries no RECAP beat near the close (the Recap intelligence engine). Emitted by intelligence_engines_check.check_copy.

HOLE-B (emitted-but-unregistered, now registered). No dedicated hook-bearing image prompt carries the Hook refrain (the Hook intelligence engine, prompt half). Emitted by intelligence_engines_check.check_prompts.
HOLE-B (emitted-but-unregistered, now registered). The Hook refrain is over-stamped on a slide (wallpapered beyond the sanctioned cadence). Emitted by intelligence_engines_check.check_copy.

HOLE-B (emitted-but-unregistered, now registered). A PRICE/ladder beat appears before any PROMISE beat — the promise must precede the price (price only matters in the absence of value). Emitted by pitch_engines_check.chk_promise_before_price via check_copy.
a phase is attested without confirmed AF-PHASE-REPORT-START + AF-PHASE-REPORT-DONE records (gateway_msg_id present) for it
phase dispatched without a client start-report emitted via openclaw message send
phase substance-validated but no client done-report emitted
prove-deck.py: a declared step was skipped, ran out of order, was unvalidated, or unreported
closeout with no CC task_id and no logged deliverable-register attempt (fail-closed on never-attempted; fail-soft on transport)

Signature Presentation routing/claim gate: the run carries signature-presentation signals (an sp_intake.json, a set Signature frame, a frame-selection question, or a 'signature presentation' request) but intake.json does not DECLARE deck_type == signature_presentation. Runs for EVERY deck (does NOT defer) via prove_sp_routing.evaluate_run_dir so a signature presentation cannot be built through the generic path by omitting the magic word (which would make every deferring SP gate no-op).
Signature Presentation intake: any of the 8 Questions (q1..q8, especially q7 the offer question) is missing or empty. DEFERS unless deck_type==signature_presentation.

Signature Presentation intake: the 8 Questions + the frame-selection question were not delivered as ONE message block (asked one-per-turn / multiple block ids). DEFERS unless deck_type==signature_presentation.
Signature Presentation intake: no frame-selection question, or signature_frame not one of rulebook|vault|quest|original. DEFERS unless deck_type==signature_presentation.
Signature Presentation intake: the sp_intake record declares a deck_type other than signature_presentation. DEFERS unless deck_type==signature_presentation.

Signature Presentation intake: q7's exact offer/product name(s) were not carried into the offer_token_ledger (the ledger the Phase-3 no-pitch prover reads). DEFERS unless deck_type==signature_presentation.

Signature Presentation structure: fewer than 100 slides with no logged client-exact override (client_overrode_slide_floor + client_exact_slide_count honored exactly). DEFERS unless deck_type==signature_presentation.
Signature Presentation structure: a phase is under its slide floor (avatar 11 / story 13 / teaching 36 / pitch 40). DEFERS unless deck_type==signature_presentation.

Signature Presentation structure: the 4 phases are not contiguous-from-slide-1 in the order avatar->story->teaching->pitch (or a slide has an invalid/missing phase or slide number). DEFERS unless deck_type==signature_presentation.
Signature Presentation structure: a phase carries no label slide (its name + purpose). DEFERS unless deck_type==signature_presentation.
Signature Presentation structure: a slide has an empty / whitespace-only suggested_image (every slide must carry a non-empty suggested_image seed). DEFERS unless deck_type==signature_presentation.

Signature Presentation structure: more than 2 CASE_STUDY-tagged slides (cap 2, floor 1), or a slide is missing its tags array so the cap cannot be dodged. DEFERS unless deck_type==signature_presentation.
Signature Presentation structure: the teaching phase does not carry 3 to 7 teaching steps. DEFERS unless deck_type==signature_presentation.

Signature Presentation structure: the hook package is missing the central hook or the four DISTINCT section hooks (one per phase, none verbatim-equal to the central hook). DEFERS unless deck_type==signature_presentation.
Signature Presentation structure: a required phase (avatar/story/pitch) is missing the N.E.E.I.T. or the 4-Quadrant marker. DEFERS unless deck_type==signature_presentation.

Signature Presentation Phase-3 (Teaching) hygiene: a q7 offer/product name, a price/monetary token, or an enroll/buy/scarcity CTA appears on a teaching-band slide, or the Phase-3->Phase-4 bridge is not contiguous. DEFERS unless deck_type==signature_presentation.

roles.description: Zoom/video/document to presentation converter. Content-first path: extracts persuasion intelligence from source content, writes intake.json with source_brief_origin: 'content-to-presentation-architect', then hands to Phase -0.5 Deep Research (ROLE-04) before the standard pipeline.
roles.routing_note: Content-first (source exists) path only. Idea-first ('I want a presentation') routes to brainstorming-buddy-presentations, NOT here.

roles.description: Writes each slide's rich image prompt to the 9,000-char prompt standard (the 15-element structural spec + negative block + spelling-locks). The Prompt QC Specialist grades the output.
INDEPENDENT reviewer of the design system (AF-TYPOGRAPHY-QC). Grades against the written typography rubric; never the Typography Architect who built it.
INDEPENDENT reviewer of the per-slide prompts (AF-PROMPT-QC). Grades against the written 9,000-char prompt-standard rubric; never the Prompt Author who wrote them.
INDEPENDENT multimodal reviewer of the rendered slides (AF-IMAGE-QC). Grades against the written image-QC rubric; never the renderer.
INDEPENDENT reviewer of the presenter speech (AF-SPEECH-QC). Grades against the written speech rubric; never the Speech Writer who authored it.
